title: ambaiba commutata
side_effects: Ambaiba commutata can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds like ambaibin. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory problems. Additionally, improper use of the plant may also cause allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential side effects.
